seoTitle: Crowdy Head vs Crows Nest — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Crowdy Head and Crows Nest. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Crowdy Head vs Crows Nest: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crowdy Head and Crows Nest.
heading: Crowdy Head vs Crows Nest — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crowdy Head, New South Wales and Crows Nest, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crowdy Head has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Crows Nest (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crowdy Head or Crows Nest safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crowdy Head has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Crows Nest scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crowdy Head scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Crows Nest scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crowdy Head or Crows Nest?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crowdy Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
